name: io.github.fieldspan-ai/margin
description: Publish agent-generated HTML to a private link; review and leave anchored comments on your phone; the comments feed back to the agent.

environmentVariables.name: MARGIN_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Margin server. Defaults to the hosted instance (https://margin.fieldspan.ai); set this only to point at a self-hosted Margin.
